task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket/path/to/file.txt') and extract only the bucket name
Create a JSON policy document that allows read-only access to a specific AWS S3 bucket for an IAM user
Write a Python function that takes an AWS CloudWatch log message timestamp in milliseconds and converts it to a human-readable ISO 8601 format string
